=== Cristal Davidson - Resume.pdf ===
          Cristal C. Davidson 

Newark, NJ | (973) 289-2752 | cristal,davidson88@gmail,com  

EDUCATION 

Franklin & Marshall College, Lancaster, PA.                                                               (Graduated 2025)  
History and American Studies Joint-Major & Africana Studies Minor 

  American History High School, Newark, NJ 
  Graduated Salutatorian                                                                                                   (Graduated 2021) 

RELEVANT  EXPERIENCE 

  Historic Preservation Trust of Lancaster County           (Lancaster, PA. September 2024 – May 2025)  
  Archives Intern 

●  Transfered surveys of historical properties in Lancaster County onto the PastPerfect software to 

improve accessibility.  

●  Cataloged physical archival materials to improve organization and cleanliness in the office. 
●  Developed social media content to promote the Trust’s initiatives.  

  Mi Gente Latina Club                                              (Lancaster, PA. September 2024 – December 2024) 
  Director of Social Engagement  

●  Coordinated with more than ten on-campus clubs and community organizations to execute social 

events. 

●  Served as the primary point of contact for club members and community partners.  

  Mi Gente Latina Club                                                             (Lancaster, PA. January 2024 – May 2024) 
  Senior Advisor  

●  Liaised with senior club members, alumni, and the executive board to improve communication and 

coordination within the club. 

●  Organized and executed events that improved senior engagement and club participation. 
●  Coordinated the purchasing and distribution of merchandise for 24 seniors in collaboration with 

alumni. 

  Franklin and Marshall College                                                              (Lancaster, PA. November 2023)        
  Department of History Student Search Committee 

●  Participated in the hiring process by asking questions and engaging with candidates to assess 

their fit for the department. 

●  Completed detailed evaluation sheets, providing structured feedback on candidates' teaching 

abilities, effectiveness, and presentation skills in a classroom setting.  

  SKILLS 

▪Communication  ▪Conflict Resolution ▪Team Collaboration ▪Organizational and Project Management
coach_notes: To strengthen your administrative career, focus on developing customer service and time management skills, as these are essential for handling inquiries and prioritizing tasks efficiently. You can build customer service by volunteering for front-desk roles or taking online courses, while time management improves through tools like calendars and to-do lists. Your existing project management and conflict resolution abilities are a strong foundation—keep leveraging them as you grow!

jobs.title: Administrative Assistant
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Organizational, teamwork, problem-solving, and software skills directly apply. Gmail and PDF proficiency are relevant. High school diploma meets basic requirement.
jobs.gaps: May need to learn specific office software or procedures. No mention of phone etiquette or scheduling experience.

jobs.title: Quality Control Specialist
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: The role may involve organizational and problem-solving skills, which are present in the resume.
jobs.gaps: No direct quality control experience, technical knowledge, or industry-specific skills. Major gap in specialized quality assurance processes and tools.

jobs.title: Services Coordinator & Bookkeeping $18-$20 per hour (DOE)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Organizational, teamwork, and problem-solving skills are relevant. Gmail and software familiarity may support bookkeeping tasks.
jobs.gaps: No bookkeeping experience or financial skills. Need training in accounting software and financial record-keeping.

jobs.title: Business Executive Assistant (Remote, Full Time)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Strong organizational, presentation, and team collaboration skills align with executive support. Social media and content skills may assist with communications.
jobs.gaps: No direct executive assistant experience. Need to develop calendar management, travel coordination, and high-level administrative skills.

jobs.title: Operations Associate
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Organizational, teamwork, and problem-solving skills are relevant. Social media and content experience may support operations tasks.
jobs.gaps: No direct operations experience. Need to develop data analysis, process optimization, and supply chain knowledge.
